# Albert's Transmission & Auto Repair
> Auto repair and transmission services, Sulphur Springs, TX

Professional automotive repair shop specializing in transmission services and general auto repair in Sulphur Springs, Texas. Family-owned heritage with state-of-the-art precision for all vehicle makes and models.

## Services
- Transmission repair and rebuilds
- Auto diagnostics
- General automotive repair
- Manual and automatic gearbox service
- Preventive maintenance

## Service Area
Sulphur Springs, TX and surrounding areas including Hopkins County, Texas

## Contact
- Phone: (903) 243-4784
- Address: 534 Industrial Dr W, Sulphur Springs, TX 75482
- Website: https://alberts-transmission-auto-repair.vercel.app

## Key Pages
- Home Page(/): Main landing page for Albert's Transmission & Auto Repair
- Transmission Services(/services/transmission): Transmission repair and rebuild services
- Maintenance(/services/maintenance): General auto maintenance services
- About(/about): Family history and shop background
- Gallery(/gallery): Shop and work photos
- Contact(/contact): Schedule an appointment

## About
Albert's Transmission & Auto Repair provides professional automotive services in Sulphur Springs, Texas, with deep expertise in transmission repair and general auto maintenance. Family-owned and operated, combining old-fashioned trust with state-of-the-art diagnostic technology. Fully licensed and insured, serving domestic and foreign vehicles of all makes and models.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What transmission services do you offer?**
We provide complete transmission repair, rebuilds, diagnostics, and maintenance for all vehicle types — both manual and automatic.

**Do you work on all car makes and models?**
Yes, we service domestic and foreign vehicles of all makes and models.

**How long do transmission repairs typically take?**
Repair time varies depending on the issue, from same-day service for minor repairs to several days for complete rebuilds.

**Do you offer warranties on your work?**
Yes, we stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties on parts and labor.

**Can you diagnose transmission problems?**
Absolutely, we use advanced diagnostic equipment to accurately identify transmission issues.
